faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Woodmere home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere clothing, webbing in closet corners, silken tubes on fabric surfaces, and small tan or brown moths flying around closets and bedrooms. You may also notice larvae casings or shed skins near affected items. Our Woodmere inspectors can identify infestations early and assess the extent of damage.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Woodmere?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Woodmere typically ranges from $550 to $5,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of affected areas. Larger homes with multiple closets or extensive fabric furnishings may require more comprehensive treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.
